role: RxBenefits — Learning and Talent Development Specialist

checks.evidence: All canonical bullets retained verbatim with every concrete: InGenius 4/4 (600+/78%/70+/75%/25+/3 programs/20+ programs/10+ vendors), NextGen 4/4 (2,000+ employee experiences, 5 cross-functional projects, DEI/Inclusive Leadership/performance review), ODN 3/3 (300+ leave cases, $362K, focus groups), Vestas 4/4 (12 leaders/23 locations/3 global locations/1,000+ competitors), Kronos 4/4 (566%). Tailoring = reorder + summary re-angle only; no metric/clause/scope word dropped.

ODN title 'Consultant, Organization & Talent Development' matches canonical exactly; bullets describe OD diagnostic consulting (leave-case audit + NGO focus groups), NOT community/ERG. NO video-editing claim anywhere. Skills design-tools line lists only Canva + Adobe InDesign (both real/permitted). No Kronos '230+/80+' fabrication present. All metrics trace to canonical resume.json.

Summary and bullets in Jamie's own voice. Cover para 1 references the JD's 'design, develop, and deliver training' but frames it as 'When I read that this role...' (explicit reference, not keyword-stuffing). No clichés detected. Borderline but acceptable.

Bullet 1 (upskill HR, 300+ leave cases) + bullet 2 ($362K leave costs, policy/first-aid) = leave-cost project. Bullet 3 (focus groups + 1:1 interviews, NGO leadership, decision-making/accountability) = separate NGO project. Each bullet stays within one project.
ODN = 3 (within 2-3 range); InGenius = 4; NextGen = 4; Vestas = 4; Kronos = 4. All exact.

checks.check: 6. COVER (voice / salutation / honesty / close / bolding / no-visa / header)
checks.evidence: Warm human voice; 'Dear Hiring Team,' present (line 9). Explicitly honest about earlier-career: 'I am honest that my title history is earlier-career than a five-year ask, but the depth is real' (line 15) — does NOT claim 5 years. Org-psych close present: 'Trained as an organizational psychologist, I treat every program as a hypothesis...' (line 17). Bolding includes company (RxBenefits, InGenius Prep, NextGen Healthcare), metrics with numbers inside (600+, 78%, 75%, 25+, 3, 300+, $362K, 2,000+), and credential (MS in Applied Organizational Psychology). No visa/sponsorship mention. Header 'Portland, OR (Open to Remote)' (line 5).

Role asks ~5yr; Jamie ~3yr. Cover discloses-then-bridges: states title history is earlier-career than a five-year ask, then emphasizes real adult-learning/OD depth (ODN, NextGen, InGenius). Disclose-then-bridge per §6 honest-gap rule. No overclaim.

observations: NON-BLOCKING: resume.json InGenius b1 uses '78% client conversion rate' (verbatim from canonical jamie/resume.json line 65), while the cover uses the preferred default '78% program enrollment rate'. Per §9 the 'program enrollment rate' phrasing is the default for non-sales roles (L&D qualifies). The resume mirrors canonical exactly so it is not a substance/truth violation, and the cover already uses the preferred default — both phrasings are real and sourced. Optional polish: align the resume bullet to 'program enrollment rate' for full consistency, but NOT required and NOT a degradation.

MINOR: header reads 'Portland, OR (Open to Remote)' vs canonical 'Open to Remote or Relocation' — acceptable per §5 location-follows-role rule for a remote/Portland role; intentional tailoring, not a defect.
